recommendations.title: Project Almanac
recommendations.overview: A group of teens discover secret plans of a time machine, and construct one. However, things start to get out of control.

recommendations.title: Synchronicity
recommendations.overview: A daring physicist travels into the past to stop a mysterious woman from stealing his invention. But once there, he uncovers a surprising truth about the machine, the woman, and his own fractured reality.

recommendations.title: The Platform 2
recommendations.overview: After a mysterious leader imposes his law in a brutal system of vertical cells, a new arrival battles against a dubious food distribution method.

recommendations.title: The Shadow Effect
recommendations.overview: A young man's life is turned upside down when his violent dreams begin to blend with reality.

recommendations.title: Sword Art Online the Movie: Ordinal Scale
recommendations.genres: Animation, Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: In 2026, a new machine called the Augma is developed to compete against the NerveGear and its successor, the Amusphere. A next-gen wearable device, the Augma doesn't have a full-dive function like its predecessors. Instead, it uses Augmented Reality

recommendations.title: Avengers Confidential: Black Widow & Punisher
recommendations.overview: When the Punisher takes out a black-market weapons dealer, he stumbles upon a far-reaching terrorist plot devised by a group known as Leviathan.

recommendations.title: Hellraiser: Bloodline
recommendations.overview: Three generations of the same family deal with the consequences of unleashing the forces of hell.

recommendations.title: The Butterfly Effect
recommendations.overview: A young man struggles to access sublimated childhood memories. He finds a technique that allows him to travel back into the past, to occupy his childhood body and change history. However, he soon finds that every change he makes has unexpected conseq

recommendations.title: The Substance
recommendations.overview: A fading celebrity decides to use a black market drug, a cell-replicating substance that temporarily creates a younger, better version of herself.

recommendations.title: eXistenZ
recommendations.overview: A game designer on the run from assassins must play her latest virtual reality creation with a marketing trainee to determine if the game has been damaged.
